seedanceSegments.title: Glossy sauce hook
seedanceSegments.description: Open with red sauce and cheese over rolled enchiladas, then clarify the filled tortilla roll.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead assembly surface. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only for global Licorn kitchen identity if the camera widens. Use @CharacterSheet for character identity and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @Spoon only as spoon shape reference. Use @RolledEnchiladasRawFrame as the raw parallel tortilla-roll topology. Use @BakedBubblingEnchiladasFrame only as the appetizing red sauce and cheese texture target, not as a full final state. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up kitchen ASMR sounds synchronized with the cuts and food actions. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s thick brick-red enchilada sauce pours onto parallel tortilla rolls; 1.2-2.5s shredded cheese rains onto wet sauce; 2.5-3.9s spoon pulls through sauce and reveals a rounded tortilla cylinder; 3.9-5.2s hard cut to overhead assembly station with one sauced tortilla, chicken filling, and cheese; 5.2-7.0s visible hands tuck one filled tortilla once. Global negatives: no text, no captions, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no lasagna slab, no tomato marinara, no floating ingredients, no extra hands, no deformed tortillas.

seedanceSegments.title: Red chile sauce bloom
seedanceSegments.description: Compress homemade red enchilada sauce into oil shimmer, spice bloom, whisk, pour, and spoon-coating ribbon.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @InductionCloseup for stovetop surface with no flame. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only for global kitchen identity. Use @SaucepanLarge only as saucepan shape. Use @Whisk only as whisk shape. Use @Spoon only as spoon shape for the final lift. Use @CharacterSheet for character identity and @PoseThreeQuarterRight for visible hand posture. Use @SauceTextureFrame as the target brick-red glossy enchilada sauce viscosity. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro food physics, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only synchronized kitchen ASMR sounds. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.1s saucepan with shimmering oil on induction; 1.1-2.3s red spices hit oil and bloom from powder to glossy paste; 2.3-3.7s whisk smooths paste into a red base; 3.7-5.2s stock pours in, then hard cut to thickened sauce; 5.2-7.0s spoon lifts sauce that falls back in a smooth nappant ribbon. Global negatives: no flame, no glowing burner, no tomato chunks, no watery soup, no grainy powder after whisking, no text, no speech, no music.

Use @SauceTextureFrame as the target brick-red glossy enchilada sauce viscosity. seedanceSegments.continuity: This segment explains the red sauce used in the hook without becoming a tutorial.

seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: pan set-down; dry spice sprinkle; wet whisk scrape; liquid pour; thick sauce drip

seedanceSegments.title: Chicken filling sizzle
seedanceSegments.description: Build the chicken, onion, green chile, and black bean filling with short hard cuts.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @InductionCloseup for macro stovetop sizzle. Use @InductionWide only for the final filling context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only for global kitchen identity. Use @Spatula only as the folding utensil. Use @CharacterSheet for character identity and @PoseThreeQuarterRight for visible hand posture. Use @CookedChickenFillingFrame as the target cooked filling state with opaque chicken, black beans, green chile flecks, and light steam. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7.5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, close-up sizzle and texture, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only synchronized kitchen ASMR sounds. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.3s diced onion scatters into hot oil; 1.3-2.8s chicken cubes and green chiles tumble in; 2.8-4.3s hard cut to opaque cooked chicken with steam and browned edges; 4.3-5.7s black beans pour in and bounce; 5.7-7.5s spatula folds finished filling once, showing beans evenly distributed. Global negatives: no raw chicken after cooked cut, no excessive browning, no floating beans, no flame, no text, no speech, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Fill and roll
seedanceSegments.description: Assemble one enchilada clearly: sauce smear, filling line, cheese, and one controlled roll.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for top-down assembly. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only for global kitchen identity. Use @CharacterSheet for character identity and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @Spoon only as sauce and filling spoon. Use @CookedChickenFillingFrame as the filling appearance reference. Use @RolledEnchiladasRawFrame as the final rolled cylinder target. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, precise visible hands, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only synchronized kitchen ASMR sounds. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.3s overhead station with one flour tortilla centered; 1.3-2.8s spoon spreads a thin red sauce oval; 2.8-4.5s chicken-bean filling lands in one compact center line; 4.5-6.1s shredded cheese falls over the filling; 6.1-8.0s hands tuck and roll one tortilla into a neat cylinder seam-side down. Global negatives: no torn tortilla, no open burrito, no multiple simultaneous rolls, no filling explosion, no extra hands, no text, no speech, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Tray gets sauced

Use @RolledEnchiladasRawFrame as the mandatory raw tray topology: several parallel flour tortilla cylinders in a baking dish. Use @SauceTextureFrame as sauce viscosity reference. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7.5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, close-up casserole textures, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only synchronized kitchen ASMR sounds. seedanceSegments.title: Bake and bubble

Use @RolledEnchiladasRawFrame only as the pre-bake tray state. Use @BakedBubblingEnchiladasFrame as the mandatory baked target: red sauce bubbles, melted cheese, slightly crisp tortilla ridges. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. seedanceSegments.title: Cheese pull hero
seedanceSegments.description: Serve one saucy bite with short cheese pull and end in the Licorn kitchen with a satisfied character and finished tray.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for close serving surface and global kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandWide for final hero kitchen context. Use @CharacterSheet for character identity, @CharacterExpressions for satisfied expression, and @PoseFront for final visible character pose. Use @Spoon only as serving spoon shape. Use @FinishedChickenEnchiladasFrame as the final finished tray target with distinct toppings. Use @BakedBubblingEnchiladasFrame only for melted cheese and saucy interior texture. Generate exactly 3 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, final comfort-food payoff, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only synchronized kitchen ASMR sounds. Mandatory timing: 0.0-2.1s spoon cuts into one enchilada and exposes chicken filling under sauce; 2.1-4.7s spoon lifts one bite with short melted cheese strands and steam; 4.7-8.0s wide hero shot in Licorn kitchen, finished tray visible, character satisfied beside the dish. Global negatives: no giant cheese web, no messy collapse, no eating mouth close-up, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no extra shots.
